title: Crossing Pyriphlegethon
description: Boats to cross the infernal fire-flaming river. (Or the nether’s lava oceans)
body:
# Crossing Pyriphlegethon
[![Oblivion](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/VoidLeech/Oblivion/1.20.1/dev/common/src/main/resources/icon.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/oblivion-api)  
Requires Oblivion.

An alternative to Striders. Create boats from Crimson & Warped wood, and cross the lava rivers (or oceans) of the underworld.

### F.A.Q.
**Q: Can this be used in my modpack?**  
**A:** Yes, but do note our license does not allow directly including the mod files in your pack.
